notes: Live 2025-01 orderCreate line-item field slice covering properties-to-customAttributes, requiresShipping, taxable, vendor, productId/product linkage, priceSet/originalUnitPriceSet, empty discountAllocations, and immediate downstream order(id:) visibility. The public Admin API version used for conformance exposes these fields on LineItem; giftCard, fulfillmentService, fulfillmentStatus, weight, and internal appliedDiscounts remain covered by focused runtime tests because they are not selectable/suppliable through this public live schema slice.

expectedDifferences.reason: Live Shopify and the local draft proxy necessarily allocate different order ids for the staged order.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy necessarily allocate different line item ids for the staged order.
